Package com.soulfiremc.server.protocol.bot.state.entity

package com.soulfiremc.server.protocol.bot.state.entity
Entity class implementations that represent the client itself and other entities.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.soulfiremc.server.protocol.bot.state
    Stateful classes that represent the bot's current state.
    com.soulfiremc.server.protocol.bot.state.registry
    Registry implementations for registries the bot uses to interact with the server and display information to the client.
